name: Crystal Pair
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>双</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>璧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When a "Crystal Beast" monster you control is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: Place 1 "Crystal Beast" monster from your Deck face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, and if you do, you take no battle damage for the rest of this turn.
eff: When a "Crystal Beast" monster you control is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: Place 1 "Crystal Beast" monster from your Deck face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, and if you do, you take no battle damage for the rest of this turn.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack
Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystal Beasts

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystals

action: Places cards from Deck in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
